summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Jobflow AI-powered job application tracker. All 16 specified features tested and verified working correctly including sidebar navigation, kanban board with drag-and-drop, right detail panel, and placeholder pages. Design elements (periwinkle gradient, glassmorphism) confirmed. No issues found.
passed_tests: Sidebar renders with Jobflow logo and 4 navigation items
Navigation routing works correctly for all 4 routes (/, /ats, /dashboard, /contacts)
Active navigation state shows royal blue highlighting
Topbar displays dynamic page titles based on current route
Add Application CTA button present with blue gradient styling
Kanban board displays 6 columns with correct job counts (Wishlist:2→1, Applied:3→4, Interview:2, In Progress:1, Offer:1, Rejected:1)
Column headers show correct status dots, uppercase labels, and counts
Job cards display proper structure: company (uppercase), title (font-weight 300), salary, date, progress bar, avatar stack, match percentage pill
Job card click opens right detail panel with 268px width and slide-in animation
Right panel shows company label, title (weight 300), royal blue score card with percentage, 3 progress bars, People section, Activity timeline
Right panel close button functionality works
Drag and drop between columns successfully changes job status (tested Figma job from Wishlist to Applied)
ATS Checker placeholder page renders at /ats route
Dashboard placeholder page renders at /dashboard route
Contacts placeholder page renders at /contacts route
Design verification: periwinkle gradient background, glassmorphism cards with backdrop-filter blur, rgba backgrounds (no flat white), Inter font
